title: Frostpunk SMP
description: A Modpack continuing the concept of Survive the Winter but increasing the scope.
body:
**Modpack deprecated. No updates will be added** Survive the Winter is a relatively difficult survival modpack focused on realism. You spawn in an infinite snowy region, where all biomes, once lush and green, are nothing but white, frozen over. You must survive with the tools that you have--and the heat that you have. Heat is an integral function of this modpack. If you let your temperature lower too far, you will eventually succumb to the frost. Raise it too much and you will overheat, ending the same way. The challenge has been suplimented so that you not only have the tools to survive but now the maschinery to thrive. Experience Frostpunk in Minecraft like never before! 
Credits to all the mod developers who made this modpack possible:
